title: ComfyCarry - Setup Wizard
subtitle: GitHub · All-in-one ComfyUI Management on RunPod / Vast.ai

fresh.title: Fresh Deployment
fresh.desc: Configure password, tunnel, cloud storage, plugins, then one-click deploy ComfyUI workspace

import.title: Restore Settings
import.desc: Restore all settings from a previously exported config file to quickly rebuild your workspace

import_upload.hint: Upload a previously exported comfycarry-config.json configuration file

step1.title: Password & SSH Access
step1.desc: Set ComfyCarry console password and SSH remote access
step1.ssh_sync: Also use as SSH Root password
step1.ssh_keys_hint: One per line, supports ed25519 / rsa / ecdsa. Paste contents of ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub
step1.ssh_keys_placeholder:
ssh-ed25519 AAAA... your-key
ssh-rsa AAAA... another-key

step2.title: Cloudflare Tunnel
step2.desc: Configure Cloudflare Tunnel for stable public access (ComfyUI / SSH / JupyterLab)

public.title: Public Node
public.desc: One-click setup, no domain or CF account needed. Get public access through ComfyCarry shared nodes.
public.subdomain_hint: Set this to keep the same address when switching instances. 3-32 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens.

custom.title: Custom Tunnel
custom.desc: Use your own Cloudflare account and domain for full control.

step2.cf_token_placeholder: Cloudflare API Token (requires Tunnel Edit + DNS Edit permissions)
step2.cf_token_hint: Create at Cloudflare API Tokens
step2.validate_empty: Please fill in API Token and domain

step3.title: Cloud Storage
step3.desc: Connect cloud storage for workspace auto-sync
step3.rclone_help: Rclone is an open-source cloud sync tool supporting OneDrive / Google Drive / S3 / R2 etc. Install Rclone on your local machine, run rclone config to create a Remote, then upload the config file (~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf).
step3.rclone_helper_hint: Don't have an rclone config? Download Setup Helper (Windows) — Unzip and run the bat script, follow the guide to authorize, then come back to upload rclone.conf.
step3.remote_required: Please add at least one Remote first
step3.url_remote_hint: URL config will be downloaded during deploy, Remote name can be entered in the next step
step3.env_remote_hint: Will be read from environment variable, Remote names auto-detected during deploy
step3.oauth_step1: 1. Install rclone on your local computer
step3.oauth_step3: 3. Paste the token JSON from terminal output below
step3.name_type_required: Please fill in name and type
step3.name_invalid: Name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

step4.title: Sync Rules
step4.desc: Choose content to sync. Rules can be freely added/modified later in ComfyCarry Cloud Sync page.
step4.default_remote_hint: Changes apply to all rules automatically. You can also set different Remotes per rule
step4.pull_help: Download files from cloud to local ComfyUI during deployment. Cloud files are not deleted. Suitable for models, LoRA, workflows and other reusable resources.
step4.push_help: Continuously monitor local directory changes and auto-push new/modified files to cloud. Suitable for generated images, workflows and other content that needs backup.
step4.rule_count: Selected rules: {count} · Can be modified in ComfyCarry Cloud Sync page after deploy

step5.title: CivitAI API Key
step5.desc: Configure CivitAI API Key to search and download models in ComfyCarry
step5.api_key_hint: Get it from CivitAI Account Settings, or skip and configure later in ComfyCarry Settings

step6.title: LLM Service
step6.desc: Configure LLM service for AI prompt generation and other features
step6.skip_hint: Can also skip and configure later in ComfyCarry Settings

step7.title: Custom Node Plugins
step7.desc: Choose ComfyUI plugins to install (* marked are required)
step7.prebuilt_subtitle: Review the plugins already included in the image, and add extra plugin URLs if needed.
step7.prebuilt_plugins: Pre-built image includes the following plugins

step8.title: Attention Acceleration
step8.desc: Choose Attention acceleration components to install
step8.sa2_desc: Next-gen Attention solution, faster in some scenarios
step8.fa2_preinstalled_desc: FA2 pre-installed, optionally install SA2 as well
step8.hint_both: When both installed, ComfyUI will prioritize FlashAttention-2
step8.hint_none: Skip to use default PyTorch SDPA
step8.attn_help: FlashAttention-2 and SageAttention-2 accelerate Transformer computation. FA2 has better compatibility and is recommended. SA2 is a newer approach that can be reused for some models. When both are installed, FA2 is prioritized.

step9.title: Confirm Deployment
step9.desc: Review the configuration below, then start deployment

env.gpu_too_old_detail: FlashAttention 2 requires Ampere (sm_80) or newer architecture. Please choose an instance with RTX 30xx / A100 / RTX 40xx or newer GPU.
env.no_gpu_detail: ComfyUI requires NVIDIA GPU. Please deploy on a GPU instance, or check CUDA driver installation.
env.unsupported_detail: Current environment is missing required runtime components. Please create an instance using the ComfyCarry pre-built image:

env_hint.password_detected: Password detected from DASHBOARD_PASSWORD environment variable
env_hint.civitai_detected: API Key detected from CIVITAI_TOKEN environment variable
env_hint.rclone_detected: Rclone configuration detected from RCLONE_CONF_BASE64 environment variable
env_hint.cf_detected: CF configuration detected from environment variables
env_hint.tunnel_active_public: Tunnel is active (Public Node: {url}). To modify, use the Dashboard Tunnel page
env_hint.tunnel_active_custom: Tunnel is active (Custom mode). To modify, use the Dashboard Tunnel page
env_hint.public_tunnel_detected: Configuration detected from PUBLIC_TUNNEL environment variable, public tunnel auto-selected

deploy.error_retry_hint: Completed steps will be skipped on retry to save time.
deploy.attn_warn: {names} installation failed, fell back to PyTorch SDPA. You can click "Retry Deploy" or reconfigure in ComfyUI page launch parameters later.
deploy.retry_hint: Click "Retry Deploy" to automatically skip completed steps.

import.success: Import successful! Restored {count} settings. Click "Next" to review and start deployment.
